message: chore(repo): reorganize root scratch into docs/ + scripts/archive/ Collects the agent scratch that had accumulated at repo root into a small set of intentionally-named subdirectories. Every "deleted" file is move-only — content preserved bit-for-bit, verified against HEAD with diff before staging. No source-of-truth code is touched by this commit; only file locations move and two text references to the old paths are rewritten. Layout after this commit: docs/ assets/ frankenfs_illustration.webp <- ./frankenfs_illustration.webp gh_og_share_image.png <- ./gh_og_share_image.png reports/ GEMINI_REVIEW_SUMMARY.md <- root ISOMORPHISM_PROOF_TEMPLATE.md ⤵ (moved to docs/templates/, see below) MODES_OF_REASONING_REPORT_AND_ANALYSIS_OF_PROJECT.md <- root PROFILE_ANALYSIS.md <- root UPGRADE_LOG.md <- root templates/ ISOMORPHISM_PROOF_TEMPLATE.md <- root scripts/ archive/ root-scratch/ <- 47 ad-hoc agent scripts agent_runner.py, check_*.py, cleanup.sh, extract_critical.py, find_unwraps.py, fix.py, fix2.py, fix_fsops, fix_fsops.rs, fix_plumbing, fix_plumbing.rs, get_*.py (7), parse_*.py (4), parse_json.rs, refactor.py, run_*.py (15), test_*.rs (5), test_logs, test_logs.rs, test_mut, test_mut.rs, test_mvcc, test_mvcc.rs, test_remove, test_remove.rs, trace_test, trace_test.rs Reference updates that go with the moves: - README.md: image path frankenfs_illustration.webp -> docs/assets/frankenfs_illustration.webp (top-of-file tag only; everything else unchanged). - scripts/verify_golden.sh: failure-path hint now points at the new template location ISOMORPHISM_PROOF_TEMPLATE.md -> docs/templates/ISOMORPHISM_PROOF_TEMPLATE.md (one echo line; behaviour unchanged). Why now: these files were accreting at the repo root from many agent sessions, making `ls` at the root noisy and obscuring the actual project structure (Cargo.toml, crates/, vendor/, scripts/, docs/). The cleanup is non-destructive — every file is recoverable in its new home, git rename detection picks up most moves automatically. Verified: `diff <(git show HEAD:OLD) NEW` returns empty for every moved file (66 deletions / 66 new entries; the .py/.sh/.md/.rs/.webp/ .png/binary set). git diff --cached --stat -M -B detects ~35 of these as renames automatically; the remainder are detected as delete+add because the files crossed multiple directory boundaries. Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context)

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
- +

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+# Root Scratch Archive
+
+This directory contains historical one-off helper scripts and scratch programs
+that previously lived in the repository root.
+
+They are kept for auditability and possible reference, but they are not canonical
+project workflows. Prefer the maintained scripts in `scripts/`, the Cargo
+workspace commands in `AGENTS.md`, and the conformance harnesses under
+`crates/ffs-harness/`.

@@ -110,7 +110,7 @@ else
     echo -e "${RED}Golden output verification FAILED.${NC}"
     echo ""
     echo "If changes are intentional, provide an isomorphism proof:"
-    echo "  1. Copy ISOMORPHISM_PROOF_TEMPLATE.md into your PR description"
+    echo "  1. Copy docs/templates/ISOMORPHISM_PROOF_TEMPLATE.md into your PR description"
     echo "  2. Fill out each field"
     echo "  3. Run: scripts/verify_golden.sh --update"
     echo "  4. Commit the updated checksums"
